enforcement.check: Foundation service must inject exactly one broker
enforcement.message: Foundation service appears to inject multiple brokers. Multi-broker orchestration belongs in processing/orchestration layer.

enforcement.check: Service methods must validate inputs before broker calls
enforcement.message: Service method appears to call broker without validation. Add validation before broker call.

enforcement.check: Foundation services must not contain UI logic
enforcement.message: UI logic detected in foundation service. Move display formatting to view service layer.

enforcement.check: Foundation services must not call other services
enforcement.message: Foundation service is injecting another service. Service composition belongs in processing/orchestration layer.
